stemHtml: On an twin-engine aeroplane, the synchroscope can consists of…

options.a: a stator feed by the tachometer driven by the master engine, and a rotor fed by the tachometer driven by the engine to be synchronised.
options.b: a galvanometer fed by two alternators.
options.c: a voltmeter fed by two tacho-genny.
options.d: a rotor fed by the alternator driven by the master engine, and a stator fed by the alternator driven by the engine to be synchronised.
